--- title: Activity Diagram - ZKP Tooling Comparison config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (Infra_LoadBalancer) for ZKP tooling comparison workflow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Define ZKP requirements
(Infra_EtcdCluster)" as Define state "Shortlist ZKP libraries" as Shortlist state "Evaluate integration fit
(Infra_EtcdCluster)" as Fit state "Run benchmarks
(Infra_RedisCache)" as Bench state "Select candidate for PoC" as Select state "Reject or defer candidate" as Reject state "Document decision and risks" as Document [Infra_WorkerNode] --> Define Define --> Shortlist Shortlist --> Fit: fits platform constraints Shortlist --> Reject: lacks required support Fit --> Bench Bench --> Select: meets PoC targets Bench --> Shortlist: fails targets Reject --> Shortlist Select --> Document Document --> [Infra_RedisCache]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个ZKP工具选型的工作流图。起点应该是从WorkerNode触发，先定义ZKP需求，这个节点需要关联EtcdCluster配置。
明白，Define节点我会标注为"Define ZKP requirements"并带上Infra_EtcdCluster。接下来是直接进入评估吗，还是先有个筛选环节？
先有个Shortlist节点，初步筛选ZKP库。然后从Shortlist分出两条路径：符合平台约束的进入Fit评估，缺少必要支持的直接Reject。
好的，已添加Shortlist和分支。Fit节点我同样关联Infra_EtcdCluster，标注为"Evaluate integration fit"。Reject节点标注"Reject or defer candidate"。
Fit之后需要Bench节点跑基准测试，这个要关联RedisCache。Bench完成后如果达到PoC目标就进入Select，失败的话要回到Shortlist重新考虑。
确认一下：Bench标注"Run benchmarks"关联RedisCache，Select是"Select candidate for PoC"，失败分支回Shortlist，成功分支到Select。还有Reject节点需要连回Shortlist形成循环吗？
对，Reject也要能回到Shortlist，这样被推迟的候选以后可以重新评估。最后Select之后要Document决策和风险，Document结束要连到RedisCache。
已完成。整个流程：WorkerNode启动→Define→Shortlist→分支到Fit或Reject→Reject可回Shortlist→Fit→Bench→分支到Select或回Shortlist→Select→Document→RedisCache。所有节点和关联infra都已配置。
